requirement_topic.en: Mandatory minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for household refrigerators — Ghana Energy Commission
requirement_topic.zh: 家用电冰箱强制最低能效标准（MEPS）——加纳能源委员会
requirement_topic.zht: 家用電冰箱強制最低能效標準（MEPS）——迦納能源委員會

summary.en: Ghana operates one of the more stringent refrigerator MEPS regimes in West Africa, administered by the Energy Commission under the Energy Efficiency Regulations (the appliance/refrigerator regulations made under the Energy Commission Act, 1997 (Act 541)). Household refrigerators and refrigerator-freezers imported into or sold in Ghana must meet a minimum energy efficiency level; units below the floor are prohibited from import and from sale. Ghana historically tightened this regime specifically to block the dumping of inefficient and used （second-hand） refrigerators, and used refrigerators are banned outright. Energy performance is determined by an adjusted-volume energy-consumption test based on the IEC 62552 / ISO 15502 measurement framework as adopted in the Ghana standard, not by China's GB 12021.2 energy-grade method. Compliance with MEPS is a precondition for the mandatory energy label （see friggh-energy-002） and for GSA/Energy Commission import clearance.
summary.zh: 加纳实行西非地区较为严格的冰箱最低能效标准（MEPS）制度，由能源委员会依据《能源委员会法》1997年（第541号法令）下制定的能效法规（器具/冰箱法规）管理。进口至加纳或在加纳销售的家用电冰箱及冷藏冷冻箱须达到最低能效水平；低于下限的产品禁止进口及销售。加纳曾专门收紧该制度以阻止低效及二手冰箱倾销，二手冰箱被全面禁止。能效依据加纳标准采纳的IEC 62552/ISO 15502测量框架、按调整容积能耗测试确定，而非中国GB 12021.2能效等级方法。符合MEPS是强制能效标签（见friggh-energy-002）及GSA/能源委员会进口放行的前提。
summary.zht: 迦納實行西非地區較為嚴格的冰箱最低能效標準（MEPS）制度，由能源委員會依據《能源委員會法》1997年（第541號法令）下制定的能效法規（器具/冰箱法規）管理。進口至迦納或在迦納銷售的家用電冰箱及冷藏冷凍箱須達到最低能效水平；低於下限的產品禁止進口及銷售。迦納曾專門收緊該制度以阻止低效及二手冰箱傾銷，二手冰箱被全面禁止。能效依據迦納標準採納的IEC 62552/ISO 15502測量框架、按調整容積能耗測試確定，而非中國GB 12021.2能效等級方法。符合MEPS是強制能效標籤（見friggh-energy-002）及GSA/能源委員會進口放行的前提。

standards_or_laws: Energy Commission Act, 1997 (Act 541) — enabling legislation for the Energy Commission
Energy Efficiency (Refrigerators and Refrigerator-Freezers) Regulations — MEPS and import prohibition for sub-standard and used refrigerators (Energy Commission of Ghana)
GS adoption of IEC 62552 / ISO 15502 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (basis for MEPS energy-consumption measurement)
Ghana ban on imported used (second-hand) refrigerators

summary.en: China sets refrigerator energy efficiency through GB 12021.2 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), the mandatory standard underpinning the China Energy Label （CEL） grading （Grade 1 most efficient to the minimum allowable grade）. The CEL filing is administered by CNIS/the China Energy Label scheme. GB 12021.2 uses a Chinese adjusted-volume / energy-consumption methodology that, while conceptually similar to the IEC 62552 framework, is calculated and graded under Chinese rules. A China energy grade does not map one-to-one to Ghana's MEPS pass/fail threshold and is not accepted by the Energy Commission as evidence of MEPS compliance.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）设定冰箱能效，该强制标准支撑中国能效标识（CEL）分级（1级最高效至最低允许等级）。能效标识备案由中国标准化研究院/中国能效标识制度管理。GB 12021.2采用中国调整容积/能耗方法，虽在概念上与IEC 62552框架相似，但按中国规则计算与分级。中国能效等级与加纳MEPS通过/不通过门槛不存在一一对应，且不被能源委员会接受作为符合MEPS的证据。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）設定冰箱能效，該強制標準支撐中國能效標識（CEL）分級（1級最高效至最低允許等級）。能效標識備案由中國標準化研究院/中國能效標識制度管理。GB 12021.2採用中國調整容積/能耗方法，雖在概念上與IEC 62552框架相似，但按中國規則計算與分級。中國能效等級與迦納MEPS通過/不通過門檻不存在一一對應，且不被能源委員會接受作為符合MEPS的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by CNIS / China Energy Label Center
GB/T compliance test methods underpinning GB 12021.2 grading

gap.en: This is the highest-risk gap for a Chinese refrigerator entering Ghana. (1) Pass/fail floor — Ghana's MEPS is an absolute import gate, not a label grade: a unit that is, say, an acceptable mid-grade under GB 12021.2 may fall below Ghana's minimum efficiency level and be refused at the border. Manufacturers must verify the specific model's adjusted-volume energy consumption against the current Ghana MEPS threshold before shipment. (2) Test method — energy consumption must be (re)determined under the IEC 62552/ISO 15502 method as adopted in Ghana; China GB 12021.2 figures are not transferable without recalculation/verification. (3) Used-unit ban — second-hand refrigerators are prohibited entirely. (4) Documentation — the Energy Commission requires model registration and the mandatory label before sale; CEL data does not satisfy this.
gap.zh: 这是中国冰箱进入加纳的最高风险差距。（1）通过/不通过下限——加纳MEPS是绝对的进口门槛，而非标签等级：在GB 12021.2下属可接受中等等级的产品，可能低于加纳最低能效水平而在口岸被拒。制造商须在出货前核实具体型号的调整容积能耗是否符合现行加纳MEPS门槛。（2）测试方法——能耗须按加纳采纳的IEC 62552/ISO 15502方法（重新）确定；中国GB 12021.2数据未经重新计算/核验不可转用。（3）二手禁令——二手冰箱被全面禁止。（4）文件——能源委员会要求型号注册及强制标签方可销售；CEL数据不满足此要求。
gap.zht: 這是中國冰箱進入迦納的最高風險差距。（1）通過/不通過下限——迦納MEPS是絕對的進口門檻，而非標籤等級：在GB 12021.2下屬可接受中等等級的產品，可能低於迦納最低能效水平而在口岸被拒。製造商須在出貨前核實具體型號的調整容積能耗是否符合現行迦納MEPS門檻。（2）測試方法——能耗須按迦納採納的IEC 62552/ISO 15502方法（重新）確定；中國GB 12021.2數據未經重新計算/核驗不可轉用。（3）二手禁令——二手冰箱被全面禁止。（4）文件——能源委員會要求型號註冊及強制標籤方可銷售；CEL數據不滿足此要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Energy Commission MEPS is an absolute import/sale gate for household refrigerators; sub-standard and used (second-hand) refrigerators are prohibited. Energy consumption determined under GS-adopted IEC 62552/ISO 15502.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 12021.2 mandatory; China Energy Label (CEL) filing mandatory for domestic sale; grade-based rather than absolute import gate

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana's refrigerator MEPS is among the strictest in the region and acts as an absolute import gate: a model below the Energy Commission's minimum efficiency level is refused entry, and used refrigerators are banned outright. China's GB 12021.2 grade does not map to Ghana's pass/fail threshold, and energy consumption must be (re)determined under the GS-adopted IEC 62552/ISO 15502 method. Verify the specific model against the current Ghana MEPS floor and complete Energy Commission registration before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳冰箱MEPS属区域内最严格之列，是绝对的进口门槛：低于能源委员会最低能效水平的型号被拒入境，二手冰箱被全面禁止。中国GB 12021.2等级与加纳通过/不通过门槛不对应，能耗须按GS采纳的IEC 62552/ISO 15502方法（重新）确定。出货前须核实具体型号是否符合现行加纳MEPS下限并完成能源委员会注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納冰箱MEPS屬區域內最嚴格之列，是絕對的進口門檻：低於能源委員會最低能效水平的型號被拒入境，二手冰箱被全面禁止。中國GB 12021.2等級與迦納通過/不通過門檻不對應，能耗須按GS採納的IEC 62552/ISO 15502方法（重新）確定。出貨前須核實具體型號是否符合現行迦納MEPS下限並完成能源委員會註冊。

requirement_topic.en: Mandatory comparative energy label (star rating) for household refrigerators — Ghana Energy Commission
requirement_topic.zh: 家用电冰箱强制对比能效标签（星级）——加纳能源委员会
requirement_topic.zht: 家用電冰箱強制對比能效標籤（星級）——迦納能源委員會

summary.en: In addition to MEPS, Ghana requires a mandatory comparative energy efficiency label on household refrigerators and refrigerator-freezers offered for sale. The Ghanaian label is a star-rating scheme （more stars = more efficient） issued/registered through the Energy Commission, which differs in design and rating arithmetic from the China Energy Label （A-G / grade-number style）. The label must be physically affixed to each unit at point of sale, must reflect the model's energy consumption as determined under the GS-adopted IEC 62552/ISO 15502 test, and must correspond to a model registered with the Energy Commission. The label is enforced jointly with GSA market surveillance; non-labelled or falsely-labelled units are subject to seizure and penalties. The label is distinct from any safety mark and from the GSA conformity decision — it specifically communicates running-cost/efficiency information to the consumer.
summary.zh: 除MEPS外，加纳要求供销售的家用电冰箱及冷藏冷冻箱强制加贴对比能效标签。加纳标签为星级方案（星越多越高效），通过能源委员会签发/注册，其设计与评级算法不同于中国能效标识（A-G/等级编号样式）。标签须在销售点实物加贴于每台产品，须反映按GS采纳的IEC 62552/ISO 15502测试确定的型号能耗，并须对应一个已在能源委员会注册的型号。标签与GSA市场监督联合执行；无标签或虚假标签的产品将被查扣并处罚。该标签独立于任何安全标志及GSA合格评定决定——专门向消费者传达运行成本/能效信息。
summary.zht: 除MEPS外，迦納要求供銷售的家用電冰箱及冷藏冷凍箱強制加貼對比能效標籤。迦納標籤為星級方案（星越多越高效），通過能源委員會簽發/註冊，其設計與評級算法不同於中國能效標識（A-G/等級編號樣式）。標籤須在銷售點實物加貼於每台產品，須反映按GS採納的IEC 62552/ISO 15502測試確定的型號能耗，並須對應一個已在能源委員會註冊的型號。標籤與GSA市場監督聯合執行；無標籤或虛假標籤的產品將被查扣並處罰。該標籤獨立於任何安全標誌及GSA合格評定決定——專門向消費者傳達運行成本/能效資訊。

standards_or_laws: Energy Efficiency (Standards and Labelling) Regulations / Refrigerator labelling regulations — mandatory star-rating energy label (Energy Commission of Ghana)
GS adoption of IEC 62552 / ISO 15502 — test basis for the label's energy-consumption figure
Energy Commission appliance model registration requirement

summary.en: China's comparative label is the China Energy Label （CEL, 中国能效标识）, mandatory for household refrigerators and based on the grading in GB 12021.2. The CEL shows an energy-efficiency grade （Grade 1 best）, rated energy consumption, and adjusted volume, and is registered/filed with the China Energy Label Center under the Administrative Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling. It is a self-declaration-with-filing scheme backed by GB test reports. The CEL communicates the same consumer information （relative efficiency） but in a Chinese grade format, with Chinese registration, and is not interchangeable with the Ghanaian star label.
summary.zh: 中国的对比标签是中国能效标识（CEL），对家用电冰箱强制适用，基于GB 12021.2分级。CEL显示能效等级（1级最优）、额定耗电量及调整容积，依据《能源效率标识管理办法》在中国能效标识中心注册/备案，是以GB检测报告为依据的自我声明加备案制度。CEL传达相同的消费者信息（相对能效），但采用中国等级格式、中国注册，与加纳星级标签不可互换。
summary.zht: 中國的對比標籤是中國能效標識（CEL），對家用電冰箱強制適用，基於GB 12021.2分級。CEL顯示能效等級（1級最優）、額定耗電量及調整容積，依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》在中國能效標識中心註冊/備案，是以GB檢測報告為依據的自我聲明加備案制度。CEL傳達相同的消費者資訊（相對能效），但採用中國等級格式、中國註冊，與迦納星級標籤不可互換。

standards_or_laws: Administrative Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling (能源效率标识管理办法) — mandatory China Energy Label filing
GB 12021.2 — grading basis for the China Energy Label

gap.en: The China Energy Label cannot be reused in Ghana. (1) Different scheme — Ghana uses a star rating registered with the Ghana Energy Commission; the China A/grade label is not recognised. (2) Separate registration — the model must be registered with the Energy Commission and a Ghana-format label printed and affixed; CEL filing does not carry over. (3) Underlying figure — the label's energy-consumption value must come from a GS-adopted IEC 62552/ISO 15502 test, not the GB 12021.2 measurement, so the rated consumption may need re-determination. (4) Enforcement — Ghana enforces the label at retail jointly with GSA; an imported unit bearing only a Chinese CEL (or no Ghana label) is non-compliant and liable to seizure. Practically, the exporter must obtain the correct star rating and a Ghana-registered label per model variant before market placement.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能在加纳复用。（1）方案不同——加纳采用在能源委员会注册的星级评定；中国A/等级标签不被承认。（2）单独注册——型号须在能源委员会注册并印制加贴加纳格式标签；CEL备案不予延续。（3）底层数据——标签能耗值须来自GS采纳的IEC 62552/ISO 15502测试，而非GB 12021.2测量，故额定能耗可能需重新确定。（4）执法——加纳在零售端与GSA联合执行标签；仅带中国CEL（或无加纳标签）的进口产品不合规并可能被查扣。实务上，出口商须在投放市场前为每个型号变体取得正确星级及加纳注册标签。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能在迦納複用。（1）方案不同——迦納採用在能源委員會註冊的星級評定；中國A/等級標籤不被承認。（2）單獨註冊——型號須在能源委員會註冊並印製加貼迦納格式標籤；CEL備案不予延續。（3）底層數據——標籤能耗值須來自GS採納的IEC 62552/ISO 15502測試，而非GB 12021.2測量，故額定能耗可能需重新確定。（4）執法——迦納在零售端與GSA聯合執行標籤；僅帶中國CEL（或無迦納標籤）的進口產品不合規並可能被查扣。實務上，出口商須在投放市場前為每個型號變體取得正確星級及迦納註冊標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Energy Commission star-rating comparative label required on each refrigerator at point of sale; tied to Energy Commission model registration and enforced with GSA market surveillance.
mandatory_status.cn: China Energy Label (CEL) mandatory for domestic sale; grade format; filed with China Energy Label Center under the labelling Administrative Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana mandates a star-rating energy label registered with the Energy Commission for every household refrigerator at retail; the China Energy Label (grade format) is not recognised. The model must be registered with the Energy Commission, the rated energy-consumption value must derive from a GS-adopted IEC 62552/ISO 15502 test, and a Ghana-format label must be affixed before sale. Plan a separate Ghana labelling/registration step per model variant; CEL data and labels do not carry over.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳要求每台家用电冰箱在零售端加贴向能源委员会注册的星级能效标签；中国能效标识（等级格式）不被承认。型号须在能源委员会注册，额定能耗值须来自GS采纳的IEC 62552/ISO 15502测试，销售前须加贴加纳格式标签。须为每个型号变体安排单独的加纳标签/注册步骤；CEL数据与标签不予延续。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納要求每台家用電冰箱在零售端加貼向能源委員會註冊的星級能效標籤；中國能效標識（等級格式）不被承認。型號須在能源委員會註冊，額定能耗值須來自GS採納的IEC 62552/ISO 15502測試，銷售前須加貼迦納格式標籤。須為每個型號變體安排單獨的迦納標籤/註冊步驟；CEL數據與標籤不予延續。
